svg.title: CitySync hackathon architecture with technology choices
svg.desc: All 7 layers with hackathon-appropriate technology: Redis Streams instead of Kafka, gpt-4o-mini for all AI, Nominatim for geocoding, dotenv instead of Vault, Python decorator instead of OPA, structlog instead of OpenTelemetry.

g.text: Layer 2 — Event streaming · Redis Streams ⟵ replaces Apache Kafka
Same consumer group semantics, persistent log, replay · zero extra services · already in stack
streams: raw.submissions · classified.complaints · dedup.results · routed.tickets · priority.boost
Layer 3 — AI processing · single gpt-4o-mini call ⟵ replaces DistilBERT + SetFit + CLIP + spaCy
One API call returns: intent · category · severity 1–10 · location_mention · visual_confirms_category
~300–400ms · $0.000135/call · zero model hosting · zero GPU needed
Layer 4 — Privacy vault (after dedup — raw GPS never leaves L3)
Layer 6 — Presentation · React + Mapbox GL JS + Socket.io
webhook.failed · priority.boost feed · commissioner override · /metrics JSON panels (replaces Grafana)
